title: parser-advance-reduce-renumber
description: Fix ts_parser__advance parity: non-destructive reduce + renumber flow, SHIFT_REPEAT semantics, and halting when all reductions merge. Acceptance: targeted tests for last_reduction_version behavior, renumber ordering, and SHIFT/SHIFT_REPEAT transitions. REQUIRED DOC UPDATE: after completion, update docs/c-go-mismatches-checklist.md entries for ts_parser__advance, non-destructive reduce+renumber, SHIFT_REPEAT handling, and version halting notes with commit reference.
